name: OID-base authorized full crawl plan
source_kind: public sitemap plus authorized page-body collection
required_gates: Written authorization or another clear license basis from the source owner.
Set OID_BASE_FULL_CRAWL_AUTHORIZED=1 before running the crawler.
Respect robots.txt and avoid disallowed paths.
Use a polite delay between page-body requests.

resume_strategy.behavior: Existing records.jsonl entries are treated as completed OIDs; the next run appends only pending sitemap entries.

operational_receipts: records.jsonl contains one parsed JSON record per completed OID.
crawl-state.json records running or complete status, selected count, completed count, and last OID.
records-summary.json records final count, first/last OID, authorization mode, raw-save mode, and resume mode.
excluded_outputs: complete JSONL page-body exports without source authorization
credentials, cookies, tokens, account data, or private correspondence
